name: Gujarat Apollo Industries Limited
summary: Gujarat Apollo Industries Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells crushing and screening equipment for quarry, mining, construction, and recycling industries in India. The company offers jaw and cone crushers; primary and secondary impact crushers; vertical shaft impact crushers; vibrating screens; mobile crushing plants; crushing and screening plants; bucket crushers; and coal sampling units, as well as spare management service. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Gujarat Apollo Equipments Limited and changed its name to Gujarat Apollo Industries Limited in November 2006. Gujarat Apollo Industries Limited was founded in 1986 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
